states.name: Rizette
states.title: Lightbearing Leader
states.description:
They came in numbers Rigland couldn't hope to match. They armed themselves with technology the world had never seen. And when the time came to stand against them, the Red Dragon Knights crumbled from the inside. Not even at the height of the Pandemonium had the future seemed so bleak.

But Rizette had no choice but to move forward.

With her brother at her side, she fled the fallen capital and returned to her hometown: the ruined Westcarte, where her adventure began. Once more, in a place of desolation, hope would rise anew.

states.name: Rizette
states.title: Lightbearing Leader
states.description:
Though her kingdom is conquered, its people aren't yet crushed. No matter what indignities the Bergarian soldiers force upon them, no matter the oppression they face, they know that somewhere out there, someone is fighting for their freedom. And they want to aid her however they can.

At the very whisper of Rizette's presence, crates of food and weapons appear at her door. Recruits band together, crude weapons in hand, untrained but ready to fight.

Her rebellion may be young, as fragile as a fawn finding its legs, but as long as Rigland's spirit burns bright, she knows she has nothing to fear.

states.name: Rizette
states.title: Lightbearing Leader
states.description:
Rizette once thought the Cerulean Crest gave her strength. And perhaps, at the time, it did. The lonely, scared girl she was never would have believed she could be a hero without its power.

In the end, though, that power was a lie.

She isn't like Finn. She had no legacy to inherit, no Crest to forge for herself. After the Pandemonium, destiny seemed to quietly leave her behind.

No one thought the burden of the kingdom's hopes would fall on her. But fall they did, and even so, she found the strength to stand.
